##RRUFFID=R120100

##LOCALITY=Christmas mine, Christmas, Gila County, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Spray of colorless to pale purple crystals. Part of the co-type. Associated with green hydroxyapophyllite and clinohedrite, R120105. Used in the Yang et al (2012) structure redetermination.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120100
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 12.53 b: 6.306 c: 8.562 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 676.5 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
